verse_text: For whoever desires to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for My sake will save it.

pericope.title: Peter's Confession: Jesus is the Christ

links.context: Thomas's statement is an unwitting prophecy of his own future martyrdom. It also illustrates the path that all believers must take--that we die daily to the world for the sake of following Christ ([[LUK.9:23]], [[LUK.9:24]]).
